name: staszekos
description: Antunovich Associates AI toolkit for Staszek Matuzik. Full StaszekOS environment: zoning research, building code lookup, SHPO narratives, RFI drafting, spec writing, editorial review, visualization, and Cowork vault integration. Includes 11 custom slash commands with self-rewriting protocols, wiki MCP server for live AA knowledge base access, and sync pipeline to keep Cowork projects updated.
